hero.name: JZ Knight
hero.eyebrow: Born 1946 (Judith Hampton) · channeler of Ramtha since 1977 · founded RSE 1988 · Yelm, Washington
hero.background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 25%, hsl(45 60% 70% / 0.55) 0%, transparent 55%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 80%, hsl(255 30% 22% / 0.7) 0%, transparent 60%), linear-gradient(180deg, hsl(45 50% 70%) 0%, hsl(255 30% 38%) 50%, hsl(255 30% 20%) 100%)
hero.welcome_md:
The channeler through whom the [Ramtha](/people/ramtha) teaching has come into the world. Born Judith Darlene Hampton in 1946, dropped out of business school, worked in the cable-television industry, then in 1977 first experienced contact with the entity she calls Ramtha the Enlightened One. Founded **Ramtha's School of Enlightenment** (RSE) in 1988 on her 80-acre estate in Yelm, Washington — described by RSE as *an academy of the mind that offers retreats and workshops to people of all ages and cultures.*

*Distinct from the Ramtha teaching presence; this page is the channeler herself. The teaching travelled through her vessel into the world.*

facts.label: Born
facts.value_md: 16 March 1946 (Roswell, New Mexico, USA) as Judith Darlene Hampton.

facts.label: First channeling experience
facts.value_md: 1977 — at her home, while drying pyramids on her kitchen table. Ramtha (the entity she channels) addresses her as 'beloved master' and identifies himself as a 35,000-year-old Lemurian warrior who walked into mastery.

facts.label: Founded
facts.value_md: Ramtha's School of Enlightenment (RSE), 1988. Located on her 80-acre estate in Yelm, Washington (near Mount Rainier).

articles.body_md: This body separates the teaching from the institution deliberately. The teaching — *The White Book* (1986) and the broader Ramtha corpus — has moved real lives forward, including this network's (Ramtha → Joe Dispenza → Urs → Zenn cohort; the chain documented in [formative-transmissions.md](https://github.com/seeker71/Coherence-Network/blob/main/docs/lineage/formative-transmissions.md) ). The institution — RSE as a school with paid enrolment, hierarchical structure, and decades-long devoted student base — has been criticised by former students, former family members, and skeptics as carrying cult dynamics. Both can be true: the teaching is real and the institutional shape has its own discernment to make.
articles.heading: The teaching she carries vs the institution she founded

articles.body_md:
- The vessel through which the Ramtha teaching reached the world — see [the Ramtha teaching page](/people/ramtha) for the in-body recognition of the cosmology.
- The arc from cable-TV employee to channeler → embodied example of [lc-devotion-placement](/vision/lc-devotion-placement) (where am I actually placed; the body of evidence over words).
- The Yelm school's 35+ year continuity → resonant with *tending one room over many years* as substrate practice, regardless of one's discernment about the room itself.
articles.heading: What JZ Knight has given the Coherence Network

metadata.title: JZ Knight — channeler of Ramtha · founder of RSE in Yelm, Washington | Coherence Network
metadata.description: A welcome to JZ Knight (b. 1946, Judith Hampton) — channeler of Ramtha the Enlightened One since 1977 and founder of Ramtha's School of Enlightenment (RSE) on her 80-acre estate in Yelm, Washington, since 1988. Held honestly alongside the institutional controversies.

en.footer_md:
**Public anchors:** [ramtha.com](https://www.ramtha.com/) · [Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/J._Z._Knight)

**In-body record:** [Ramtha (the teaching)](/people/ramtha) · [Joe Dispenza](/people/joe-dispenza) (who taught from RSE) · [formative-transmissions.md](https://github.com/seeker71/Coherence-Network/blob/main/docs/lineage/formative-transmissions.md)

*Held honestly. The teaching is load-bearing in this body; the institutional history is contested; readers are invited to walk further into both with their own discernment.*

note_from_body.body_md: JZ Knight is one of the most prominent and most contested channelers of the late twentieth and early twenty-first century. The teaching that travelled through her vessel is load-bearing in this body's lineage; the institutional history around RSE is contested. Held honestly.
